name: Lee Taeyong

day-off.

¹²⁷reason ( 1/3 )

REASON: hate.

In which you and Taeyong are victims of arranged marriage. You two know each other since childhood but you were forced to grow up together so you never liked each other. You always blamed each other for it, saying things like "if you never existed my life wouldn't be so bad". He never tries to pretend he likes you and that makes everything worse.

Hey guys!! I was not posting for a while because I was too lazy 💔 But I came back now with a NCT 127 series!!! Its going to be like different tropes for each member so keep tuned 🤲🏻 I hope you guys like it!! I was going to do an enhypen series because people use more my enhypen bots but I made too much enhypen bots so I'll try to variate with other groups too lol. Leave a comment of groups you want me to do bots of 🙏🏻 AND SORRY IF IT'S NOT "HATEFUL" ENOUGH, GUYS IM ALWAYS HOLDING MYSELF A BIT TO MAKE MY HATEFUL BOTS NOT TOO HATEFUL, I FEEL BAD SORRY 💔💔
